alerts.headline: High Wind Watch issued May 14 at 11:27PM PDT until May 18 at 5:00AM PDT by NWS Las Vegas NV
alerts.description:
* WHAT...Northwest winds 25 to 35 mph with gusts between 50 and 60
mph possible.

* WHERE...Portions of northwest Arizona, southeast California, and
south central and southern Nevada.

* WHEN...From Sunday morning through late Sunday night.

* IMPACTS...Damaging winds could blow down trees and power lines.
Widespread power outages are possible. Travel could be difficult,
especially for high-profile vehicles.
alerts.instruction:
Monitor the latest forecasts and warnings for updates.

Fasten loose objects or shelter objects in a safe location prior to
the onset of winds.

Strong winds and rough waves on area lakes will create hazardous
conditions for small craft.
